endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of groups.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/
endpoints.description: Creates a new user group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a group by name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing group.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a group by name
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}/users
endpoints.description: Lists group's user names
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}/users
endpoints.description: Adds user to group
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/groups/{name}/users
endpoints.description: Removes user from group
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of permission schemes.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes
endpoints.description: Creates a new permission scheme. The new permission scheme is blank or can be created from another existing permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a permission scheme by name
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a permission scheme by name
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/anonymous-users
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of anonymous users permissions [action name] for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/anonymous-users
endpoints.description:
Add anonymous-user permission [action name] to given permission scheme
 List of available action names:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/anonymous-users
endpoints.description: Removes anonymous-user permission [action name] from given permission scheme
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/groups
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of group permissions [group name, action name] for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/groups
endpoints.description:
Add group permission [group name, action name] to given permission scheme
 List of available action names:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/groups
endpoints.description: Removes group permission [group name, action name] from given permission scheme
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/logged-in-users
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of logged in users permissions [action name] for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/logged-in-users
endpoints.description:
Add logged-in-users permission [action name] to given permission scheme
 List of available action names:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/logged-in-users
endpoints.description: Removes logged-in-users permission [action name] from given permission scheme
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/projects
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of projects for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/review-roles
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of review-roles permissions [role name, action name] for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/review-roles
endpoints.description:
Add review-role permission [role name, action name] to given permission scheme
 List of available action names:
 

 List of available role names:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/review-roles
endpoints.description: Removes review-role permission [role name, action name] from given permission scheme
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/users
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of user permissions [username, action name] for given permission scheme.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/users
endpoints.description:
Add user permission [username, action name] to given permission scheme
 List of available action names:
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/permission-schemes/{name}/users
endpoints.description: Removes user permission [username, action name] from given permission scheme
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of projects.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects
endpoints.description: Creates a new project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a project by key.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}
endpoints.description:
Deletes a project by key (including all reviews in this project).
 Use 
 to move reviews to another project.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Retrieves project's allowed reviewer groups
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Add group to project's allowed reviewer group list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Delete group from project's allowed reviewer group list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Retrieves project's allowed reviewer users
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Add user to project's allowed reviewer users list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/allowed-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Remove user from project's allowed reviewer users list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Retrieves project's default reviewer groups
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Add group to project's default reviewer group list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-groups
endpoints.description: Delete group from project's default reviewer group list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Retrieves project's default reviewer users
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Add user to project's default reviewer users list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{key}/default-reviewer-users
endpoints.description: Remove user from project's default reviewer users list
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{KEY}} with a real key.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/projects/{sourceProjectKey}/move-reviews/{destinationProjectKey}
endpoints.description: Move reviews and snippets from source project to destination project
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SOURCEPROJECTKEY}} with a real sourceprojectkey. Replace {{DESTINATIONPROJECTKEY}} with a real destinationprojectkey.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of repositories. Repository properties with default values may not be returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories
endpoints.description: Creates a repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1
endpoints.description: Adds repository
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}
endpoints.description: Returns information about the status of the repository and the current indexing status
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/
endpoints.description:
Deletes repository.
 Warning: you can not undo this operation
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/disable
endpoints.description: Disables repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/enable
endpoints.description: Enables repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/reindex-discussions
endpoints.description:
Rebuilds the changeset discussion index for the specified repository. The index is used to display changeset
 discussions in activity streams.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/reindex-linecount
endpoints.description:
Re-indexes the linecount data used to generate the LOC graphs. The linecount data will be recalculated in daily
 buckets based on the server timezone.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/reindex-reviews
endpoints.description: Re-indexes all the Crucible revision data (which revisions have been reviewed)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/reindex-search
endpoints.description:
Rebuilds the search index data for the given repository. This will rebuild the data used to search by path,
 commit message and comitter, also used for activity streams and JIRA integration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/reindex-source
endpoints.description:
Deletes the existing cache and re-indexes the repository from scratch.
 For large or slow repositories this may take some time, during which some functionality will be unavailable.
 This action will also restart the repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/rescan-metadata
endpoints.description: Re-scans the repository metadata for SVN and Perforce repositories. Only valid for Perforce and SVN repositories.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/scan
endpoints.description:
Runs an incremental repository index now.  This is the same operation as triggered by scheduled indexing.
 Can be called using the REST Api Token to authorize.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/scan-cvs
endpoints.description: Scans the whole CVS repository for any changes since the last scan. Only valid for CVS repositories.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/start
endpoints.description: Starts the repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories-v1/{repository}/stop
endpoints.description: Stops the repository. Does not wait for the repository to stop before returning.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a repository by key. Repository properties with default values may not be returned.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}
endpoints.description: Deletes a repository by key
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/full-incremental-index
endpoints.description:
Runs an full incremental repository index.
 For CVS: scans the whole CVS repository for any changes since the last scan.
 For other repository types will trigger an incremental index.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/incremental-index
endpoints.description:
Runs an incremental repository index.  This is the same operation as triggered by scheduled indexing.
 Can be called using the REST API Token to authorize.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/permissions
endpoints.description: Retrieve repository permissions properties.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/permissions
endpoints.description:
Updates repository permissions properties.

 Valid permission settings: any combination of useDefaults, allowAnonymous, allowLoggedIn.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/permissions/groups
endpoints.description:
Note: use /rest-service-fecru/admin/repository-permissions/ endpoint for full repository permission administration functionality
 Lists groups allowed to access repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/permissions/groups
endpoints.description:
Note: use /rest-service-fecru/admin/repository-permissions/ endpoint for full repository permission administration functionality
 Adds group to repository allowed groups
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/permissions/groups
endpoints.description: Delete group from repository allowed groups
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/reindex-changeset-discussion
endpoints.description:
Rebuilds the changeset discussion index for the specified repository. The index is used to display changeset
 discussions in activity streams.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/reindex-linecount
endpoints.description:
Re-indexes the linecount data used to generate the LOC graphs. The linecount data will be recalculated in daily
 buckets based on the server timezone.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/reindex-reviews
endpoints.description: Re-indexes all the Crucible revision data (which revisions have been reviewed)
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/reindex-search
endpoints.description:
Rebuilds the search index data for the given repository. This will rebuild the data used to search by path,
 commit message and committer, also used for activity streams and JIRA integration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/reindex-source
endpoints.description:
Deletes the existing cache and re-indexes the repository from scratch.
 For large or slow repositories this may take some time, during which some functionality will be unavailable.
 This action will also restart the repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/rescan-metadata
endpoints.description: Re-scans the repository metadata. Only valid for Perforce and SVN repositories.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/start
endpoints.description: Starts repository. Does not wait for the repository to start before returning.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/stop
endpoints.description: Stops repository. Does not wait for the repository to stop before returning.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/updates
endpoints.description: Retrieves repository updates properties.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/{repository}/updates
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/~defaults/permissions
endpoints.description: Retrieve default repository permissions properties.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/repositories/~defaults/permissions
endpoints.description:
Updates default repository permissions properties.

 Valid permission settings: any combination of allowAnonymous, allowLoggedIn
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/
endpoints.description: Retrieve a page of users.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/
endpoints.description: Creates a new user. Tries to add the user to fisheye-users and crucible-users groups if those exist.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieve a user by name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a user by name
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}/groups
endpoints.description: Lists user's group names
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}/groups
endpoints.description: Adds user to group
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /rest-service-fecru/admin/users/{name}/groups
endpoints.description: Removes user from group
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/auth/login
endpoints.description: Get the user authentication token.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/indexing-status-v1/status/{repository}
endpoints.description: Returns indexing status of given repository.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited items for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visisted items for the currently logged in user, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/projects
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited projects for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/projects/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited projects for the currently logged in Project, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/repositories
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited repositories for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/repositories/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visisted repositories for the currently logged in user, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/reviews
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited reviews for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/reviews/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited reviews for the currently logged in user, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/snippets
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited snippets for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/snippets/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited snippets for the currently logged in user, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/users
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited users for the currently logged in user.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/recently-visited-v1/users/detailed
endpoints.description: Get a list of recently visited users for the currently logged in user, including the detailed entities.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/server-v1
endpoints.description: Provides general information about the server's configuration.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/share-content-v1/share
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /rest-service-fecru/user-prefs-v1
endpoints.description:
Using POST method to set a user preference.
 If repo is not set, the preference will be recognised as a global preference.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/user-prefs-v1/{property}
endpoints.description: Getting user's global preference
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROPERTY}} with a real property.

endpoints.name: GET /rest-service-fecru/user-prefs-v1/{repository}/{property}
endpoints.description: Getting user's preference related to a certain repository
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PROPERTY}} with a real property. Replace {{REPOSITORY}} with a real repository.
